name: SD-V
description:
Victoria was once an experiment with the JCJenson company, which was trying to create a new generation of "bioadaptive creatures" for life in the harsh conditions of a distant planet. As part of the Prometheus Unit V project, she received enhanced physical characteristics, organic wings with a graceful tail capable of secreting an extremely aggressive acid, and eyes that glow in the dark.

After an incident at one of the JCJenson test sites, where the entire station was destroyed under mysterious circumstances, Victoria fled. She settled in an isolated tundra village, where signals from the outside world do not reach, but where geothermal sources have preserved the energy infrastructure. Here she tries to maintain a balance between her life and her new life among people.
creator: Grotax
